description: Webhook events for card payments, 3D Secure, and card vaulting

PAYMENT.CAPTURE.PENDING.action: Wait for completion webhook before fulfilling

VAULT.PAYMENT-TOKEN.CREATED.description: Card was successfully saved to vault
VAULT.PAYMENT-TOKEN.CREATED.action: Store payment token ID for future charges

VAULT.PAYMENT-TOKEN.DELETED.description: Saved card was removed from vault
VAULT.PAYMENT-TOKEN.DELETED.action: Remove payment token from your database

PAYMENT.AUTHORIZATION.CREATED.action: Record authorization ID for later capture

webhook_verification.note: Same verification process as Standard Checkout — see standard-checkout webhooks mapping for full details

best_practices: Subscribe to VAULT.PAYMENT-TOKEN.CREATED for card vaulting flows
Use PAYMENT.CAPTURE.COMPLETED as authoritative confirmation of card payment
Handle PAYMENT.CAPTURE.PENDING for cards that require additional review
